assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce Asset ID for the VDD device. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce Account ID for the customer. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The device serial number. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

deviceESN.title: deviceESN
deviceESN.description: The device Electronic Serial Number. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

vehicleName.title: vehicleName
vehicleName.description: The name of the vehicle where the device will be installed. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The customer's name. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

customerPhone.title: customerPhone
customerPhone.description: The customer's phone number. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

deliveryAddress.title: deliveryAddress
deliveryAddress.description: The delivery/install address. Pass from Get Delivery Details output.

preferredDate1.title: preferredDate1
preferredDate1.description: First preferred install date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.

preferredTime1.title: preferredTime1
preferredTime1.description: Time of day for first preference: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.

preferredDate2.title: preferredDate2
preferredDate2.description: Second preferred install date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.

preferredTime2.title: preferredTime2
preferredTime2.description: Time of day for second preference: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.

preferredDate3.title: preferredDate3
preferredDate3.description: Third preferred install date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.

preferredTime3.title: preferredTime3
preferredTime3.description: Time of day for third preference: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening. Pass from Collect Install Dates output.
